name: build_defensive_wall
description: Build defensive wall at position X1 Y0 Z1 with height 2 using oak_planks
parameters: z.object({position:z.object({x:z.number().describe('Base X coordinate (wall starts here and extends along +X)'),y:z.number().describe('Base Y coordinate (bottom)'),z:z.number().describe('Base Z coordinate')}).describe('Starting corner position for the wall'),length:z.number().int().min(1).max(20).describe('Wall length along +X'),height:z.number().int().min(1).max(10).describe('Wall height'),material:z.string().describe('Block name e.g. oak_planks')})
code: const basePos = new Vec3(Math.floor(args.position.x), Math.floor(args.position.y), Math.floor(args.position.z));const totalNeeded = args.length * args.height;const totalAvailable = bot.inventory.items().filter(i => i.name === args.material).reduce((sum, i) => sum + i.count, 0);if (totalAvailable < totalNeeded) {return `<INSUFFICIENT_MATERIAL>: Need ${totalNeeded}, have ${totalAvailable} ${args.material}`;}const movements = new Movements(bot);bot.pathfinder.setMovements(movements);let placedCount = 0;const refInfos = [{delta: new Vec3(0, -1, 0), face: new Vec3(0, 1, 0)}, {delta: new Vec3(-1, 0, 0), face: new Vec3(1, 0, 0)}, {delta: new Vec3(1, 0, 0), face: new Vec3(-1, 0, 0)}, {delta: new Vec3(0, 0, -1), face: new Vec3(0, 0, 1)}, {delta: new Vec3(0, 0, 1), face: new Vec3(0, 0, -1)}];for (let lx = 0; lx < args.length; lx++) {const colPos = basePos.offset(lx, 0, 0);await bot.pathfinder.goto(new goals.GoalNear(colPos.x, colPos.y + args.height / 2, colPos.z, 2));for (let hy = 0; hy < args.height; hy++) {const targetPos = colPos.offset(0, hy, 0);const targetBlock = bot.blockAt(targetPos);if (targetBlock.name !== 'air') continue;let placed = false;for (let refInfo of refInfos) {const refPos = targetPos.offset(refInfo.delta.x, refInfo.delta.y, refInfo.delta.z);const refBlock = bot.blockAt(refPos);if (refBlock && refBlock.name !== 'air' && refBlock.name !== 'water') {const getItem = () => bot.inventory.items().find(i => i.name === args.material && i.count > 0);const item = getItem();if (!item) {return '<OUT_OF_MATERIAL>: Ran out';}if (!bot.heldItem || bot.heldItem.name !== args.material) {await bot.equip(item, 'hand');}try {await bot.placeBlock(refBlock, refInfo.face);placed = true;break;} catch (err) {}}}if (placed) placedCount++;await bot.waitForTicks(10);}}return `<BUILT_WALL>: Placed ${placedCount}/${totalNeeded} blocks for ${args.length}x${args.height} defensive wall using ${args.material}`;

name: shoot_zombie
description: Use bow to shoot nearest zombie with arrows
parameters: z.object({entityType:z.string().describe('The entity type to target, e.g. “zombie”'),options:z.object({arrowCount:z.number().int().min(1).max(64).describe('Number of arrows to shoot'),targetId:z.number().optional().describe('Specific entity ID; if omitted shoots nearest entityType')}).describe('Shooting options')})
code: const bow=bot.inventory.findInventoryItem('bow');if(!bow){return'<NO BOW>: No bow found.';}let arrowCountAvailable=0;for(const item of bot.inventory.items()){if(item.name==='arrow')arrowCountAvailable+=item.count;}if(arrowCountAvailable<args.options.arrowCount){return'<NO ARROWS>: Need '+args.options.arrowCount+' arrows.';}await bot.equip(bow,'hand');let target;if(args.options.targetId!=null){target=bot.entities[args.options.targetId];if(!target||target.name!==args.entityType){return'<NO TARGET>: Invalid target ID or type.';}}else{target=bot.nearestEntity(entity=>entity.name===args.entityType&&!entity.isDead());if(!target){return'<NO TARGET>: No '+args.entityType+' nearby.';}}const dist=target.position.distanceTo(bot.entity.position);if(dist>40){return'<TOO FAR>: '+Math.round(dist)+' blocks away.';}let shots=0;for(let i=0;i<args.options.arrowCount;i++){if(!target||target.isDead?.())break;const aimPos=target.position.plus(new Vec3(0,1,0));await bot.lookAt(aimPos);await bot.activateItem();shots++;await bot.waitForTicks(10);}return'<SHOT>: Fired '+shots+' arrow(s) at '+args.entityType+' (ID: '+target.id+').';
